steps.title: Expand both sides
steps.content:
Distribute on each side.
$$18(x-15)=18x-270$$
$$-15(x+18)=-15x-270$$
So the equation becomes
$$18x-270=-15x-270$$

steps.title: Solve and count
steps.content: Add $15x$ and $270$ to both sides. $$33x=0$$ $$x=0$$ There is exactly one real solution. The answer is A.
